name: COMPETITION LAW
description: This is a third-year undergraduate module on competition law. The module will cover the basic rules of competition law in the EU, UK and other legal systems, including rules against anticompetitive agreements, monopolisation/abuse of dominance, anticompetitive mergers and public and private enforcement of competition rules. The module will be taught through lectures and debate-seminars and assessed by MCQ (10%) and Moot/debate (90%).

assessment.title: . Students will be tested through an oral moot at the end of the semester
